raw_head:
{ "welcome_flow": [ { "email_name": "Welcome 1: Welcome & 10% Off", "subject_a": "Welcome to the circle, {{first_name|default:'friend'}}.", "subject_b": "Your journey starts now.", "preheader": "Here’s your welcome gift and a guide to conscious exploration.", "body_html": "

Hello {{first_name|default:'friend'}},

Welcome to Dark Fantasy. We’re so glad you’re here. You’ve taken the first step on a path of deeper connection and more intentional intimacy, and we’re honored to be your guide.

Our philosophy is simple: exploration should be empowering, luxurious, and above all, safe. It’s why we meticulously curate every piece in our collection—to ensure it meets the highest standards of quality and body-safe design.

To help you begin, we’ve put together a foundational guide on a topic we consider non-negotiable: body-safe materials. Understanding the difference between silicone, glass, and other materials is the cornerstone of confident play. Knowledge is the ultimate luxury.
